description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every pull request. Use a matrix job that tests LLVM versions 3.9.0 through 8.0.0 on both ubuntu-18.04 and macOS-10.14. For each combination, check out the repository with submodules, then run an Ansible playbook specific to the OS, passing in the LLVM version, source directory, Git reference, and other parameters.
